# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - notify
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: none

build_job:
  stage: build
  script: echo "Building the project" # replace this with your actual build script
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - dist/

notify_job:
  stage: notify
  script:
    - 'BODY="MR Title: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}\nMR Description: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}\nCommit Message: ${CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}\n"'
    - 'curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{"text": "$BODY"}" http://your-notification-service' # replace the url with your actual notification service endpoint

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script: 
    - echo "Deploying the project with tag ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}" # replace this with your actual deploy script which includes the merge request title in deployment tags
  only:
    - master
